programs.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programs.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: The Aging Brain
programs.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programs.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programs.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programs.desc: Adam eats cheddar in Cheddar before traveling to a farm café for roast chicken and a cheesy celeriac and leek bake, stopping at a vending machine for chocolate milk and tucking into a quiche from a mother-daughter bakery.

programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programs.desc: Adam travels to Melton Mowbray for a famous pork pie, some traditional sweets, a chicken curry at an award-winning restaurant and a mac and cheese doughnut from a village eatery.
